name: hunch
description: Hunch — Engineering Memory OS: a git-native reasoning graph of decisions, bugs, and invariants, enforced at reasoning time.

plugins.name: hunch
plugins.description: The hunch_* MCP tools (why, constraints, blast radius, merge verdict, capture) plus /hunch:capture, /hunch:heal, /hunch:why, /hunch:fix, /hunch:fragile. Requires Node 22.13+; runs `npx @davesheffer/hunch mcp` per project.
